chrome.notes:
Added support for AnimeKai.to
Now supports 26 streaming sites
Improved anime matching accuracy
Fixed detection when switching episodes
Fixed incorrect anime matches (e.g. sequels vs originals)

firefox.notes:
Redesigned update notifications
Changelog moved to Settings > What's New
Dismissable update banner
Added support for AnimeKai.to
Improved anime matching accuracy
Fixed detection when switching episodes
